name: IGK_locus_chr2
description: Immunoglobulin kappa light chain locus on chr2p11.2, ~1.8 Mb. Contains ~40 functional Vκ genes (and ~36 pseudogenes), 5 Jκ segments, and a single Cκ exon. The Vκ region is organised into two clusters (distal and proximal) separated by a ~800 kb spacer; the proximal cluster is inverted relative to the distal cluster. Recombines somatically via V-J joining (no D segments). Intra-locus Vκ duplications produce paralogous sequence requiring PSV-aware mapping.
expected_copy_count: 1 functional per haplotype but rearranged in mature B cells; one inversion of the proximal Vk cluster also occurs as a polymorphism
